'''Gettiarn''' was the ninth planet in the [[Iotran system]]. The [[Gettiarn Space Station]] orbited the planet and was operated by the [[Iotran Police Force]]. It served as the hub of space traffic control for the entire system.

*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
